'''''Marvel Movie Showcase'' 2''' collects the fourth, fifth, and sixth issues from the [[Star Wars (1977)|''Star Wars'' (1977)]] series of comics and had a $1.25 U.S. cover price.

This issue reprints the cover to [[Star Wars (1977) 4|''Star Wars'' (1977) 4]], but without the original text.

This is a comics adaptation of [[Star Wars: Episode IV A New Hope|''Star Wars'': Episode IV ''A New Hope'']].

==Contents==
*[[Star Wars (1977) 4|''Star Wars'' (1977) 4]]
*[[Star Wars (1977) 5|''Star Wars'' (1977) 5]]
*[[Star Wars (1977) 6|''Star Wars'' (1977) 6]]
